packageSummary:
**Summary:** Experience the enchanting beauty of Kerala with our customizable 8-day 'Escape to Kerala' package. Explore the tranquil landscapes of Kochi, Munnar, Alleppey, and Kovalam, as you immerse yourself in the rich culture and history of this stunning South Indian state. Visit iconic landmarks such as the Dutch Palace, St. Francis Church, and the scenic backwaters of Alleppey. Enjoy the warm hospitality and local cuisine, and take part in exciting activities, including boat rides and sightseeing excursions. Our package offers a unique blend of relaxation, adventure, and cultural discovery.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Kochi, Meals: N/A
- Arrive at Kochi airport and transfer to the hotel.
- Take a sightseeing tour of Kochi, visiting the Dutch Palace, St. Francis Church, and the Chinese fishing nets on the harbour.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Kochi to Munnar, Meals: Breakfast
- Drive to Munnar, a beautiful hill station, and arrive by the afternoon.
- Check into the hotel and enjoy rest of the day at leisure or one can go and explore the local market.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 3:** Munnar, Meals: Breakfast
- Take a sightseeing tour of Munnar, visiting the Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, Old Munnar Town, and the town market.
- Enjoy rest of the day at leisure.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 5:** Thekkady to Alleppey, Meals: Breakfast
- Drive to Alleppey and arrive by the afternoon.
- Check into the hotel and enjoy rest of the day at leisure or take an optional cruise on the backwaters.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 6:** Alleppey to Kovalam, Meals: Breakfast
- Drive to Kovalam, a beautiful beach town, and arrive by the afternoon.
- Check into the resort and enjoy rest of the day at leisure.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 7:** Kovalam excursion, Meals: Breakfast
- Visit the Lighthouse Beach, one of the main attractions, and Samudra Beach.
- Explore the local market and enjoy the evening at leisure.
- Stay overnight at the hotel.

**Day 8:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Trivandrum airport/railway station.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in the mentioned or similar hotels.
- Meals as per Itinerary (breakfast and dinner).
- Transportation by A/c vehicle for arrival/departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary.
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing.

**Exclusions:**

- Any Air or Rail fare.
- Any other meal not mentioned in price includes.
- Tips & Porterage.
- Any monument entrance fees, camera fees, guide charges.
- Any expenses of personal nature.
- GST @ Current Rate.

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Reethi Faru - 04 Nights 05 Days' package is a 5-day romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Maldives. The itinerary includes a relaxing stay at the luxurious Reethi Faru resort, exploring the island's stunning beaches, coral reefs, and crystal-clear waters. The package also includes a scenic seaplane transfer, a full-board meal plan, and travel insurance for the travel duration. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Maldives, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at the Male International Airport and transfer to Reethi Faru resort.
- Check-in and spend the rest of the day at leisure, exploring the island and its surroundings.

**Day 2 - 4:** Maldives, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner
- Enjoy the full-board meal plan at the resort, with a range of delicious local and international cuisine.
- Spend the days relaxing on the beach, exploring the coral reefs, or taking part in water activities such as snorkeling or diving.

**Day 5:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Check-out of the resort and transfer back to the Male International Airport for departure.

**Inclusions:**

- 04 Night’s accommodation in Deluxe Beach Bungalow
- Meal Plan as per selection – Full Board
- Return Seaplane transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary.
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
- RT-PCR Test
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Highlights:**

- Scenic seaplane transfer to and from the resort
- Relaxing stay at the luxurious Reethi Faru resort
- Exploring the island's stunning beaches, coral reefs, and crystal-clear waters
- Full-board meal plan with a range of delicious local and international cuisine
- Travel insurance for the travel duration
- A romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Maldives

**Summary:**
The 'Australian Extravaganza - Durga Puja Special' package is a 11-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Australia. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Great Ocean Road, the Great Barrier Reef, the Sydney Opera House, and the Blue Mountains, as well as a tour of the city of Melbourne. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a jet boat ride, a visit to the famous Sea World, and a hot air balloon ride.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Melbourne, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Melbourne airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the city and its surroundings.

**Day 2:** Melbourne Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Great Ocean Road and enjoy the breathtaking views of the coastline.
- Visit the famous Twelve Apostles rock formation and enjoy the scenic views of the ocean.

**Day 3:** Cairns, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Fly to Cairns and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Kuranda village and experience the intimate experience of the rainforest scenery.

**Day 4:** Cairns, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Great Barrier Reef and enjoy the snorkeling or diving experience.
- Enjoy the beauty of the reef and the surrounding waters.

**Day 5:** Gold Coast, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Fly to Gold Coast and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the famous Sea World and enjoy the thrill of the jet boat ride.

**Day 6:** Gold Coast, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Movie World and enjoy the thrilling rides and attractions.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 7:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Fly to Sydney and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the famous Sydney Opera House and enjoy the guided tour of the city.

**Day 8:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Blue Mountains and enjoy the scenic views of the mountains.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 9:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Sydney Tower and enjoy the panoramic views of the city.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 10:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Enjoy the day at leisure and explore the city on your own.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 11:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Sydney.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.
- All local taxes & services as of 1st Feb, 2024.
- Cost of Visa & Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above mentioned itinerary.
- All transfers & excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
- Services of a professional, friendly & multilingual Thomas Cook I Ltd Tour Manager (Subject to minimum 30 customers) or a local Representative.

**Exclusions:**

- If you wish to travel in advance i.e. before the published departure date as mentioned in the brochure or like to come back on a later date after the tour ends, there will be an additional charge that will be applicable (subject to availability of seats for the given dates & ticket validity) which will be advised to you by our sales staff / travel agent.
- Mandatory Tipping for on tour Services (Coach Driver, Local Guides etc.).
- Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as of 1st Feb 2024).
- PCR test in India & Australia.
- Applicable Government Taxes are additional.
- The tour cost does not include POE charges & passport charges.
- No porterage included.
- Any expenses of personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, mini-bar, mineral water, telephone charges, food & drink that are not a part of the package.
- Additional Meals that is not mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees & local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of Optional Excursions.
- Land surcharges due to Local Events applicable on certain departures.

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Villa Park 04 Nights 05 Days' package is a 5-day romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Maldives. The itinerary includes arrival in Male, a relaxing stay at a luxurious resort, and a range of activities such as exploring the island, enjoying the beach, and taking a speedboat transfer to the resort. The package also includes accommodation in a beach villa and a water villa, a full board meal plan, and return speedboat transfers.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Male, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive in Male and check-in at the hotel
- Spend the rest of the day at leisure and explore the island

**Day 2-4:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Explore the island on your own and enjoy the beautiful beaches

**Day 5:** Departure from Male, Meals: Breakfast
- Check-out from the hotel and transfer to the International Airport for departure

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in 2 nights Beach villa + 2 nights Water Villa
- Meal Plan as per selection – Full Board
- Return Speedboat transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check-in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
- RT-PCR Test
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Product Terms and Conditions:**

- The upgrade hotel/villa prices are subject to availability at the time of booking.
- The upgrade hotel/villa prices DO NOT GUARANTEE rooms at the envisaged hotels/Villa.
- The upgrade hotel/villa rooms are subject to availability at the time of booking.
- For the upgrade hotel/villa, In case the hotel/villa chosen is unavailable we will provide with multiple options of similar category hotel/villa.
- The rates are valid for minimum 02 adults travelling together at all times.
- The rates are not valid on block out dates.
- Surcharges as and when applicable will be advised and passengers would be requested to pay the same.

**Summary:** Join the 'Highlights Of Scandinavia Fjord Cruise With 4 Nights Denmark (Summer 2024)' package for an unforgettable 12-day journey through Scandinavia. This tour takes you to the breathtaking fjords of Norway, the picturesque city of Copenhagen, and the vibrant city of Malmo. Enjoy a mix of city exploration, scenic drives, and exciting activities such as a fjord cruise, sightseeing, and a city tour. Relax in comfort at hotels and on-board the cruise, and enjoy delicious meals throughout the tour.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Copenhagen, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Copenhagen Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Copenhagen Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rosklide – Visit the Viking Ship Museum – See the Rosklide Cathedral.
- Explore the city and its markets.

**Day 3:** Copenhagen Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Odense – Visit the Hans Christian Anderson House – Visit Egeskov Castle.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 4:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Board your cruise and enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.
- Enjoy a meal at the buffet deck or sip a drink at any of the lounges.

**Day 5:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 6:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Visit the Malmoa – Photo-stop of Oresund Bridge – Photo-stop of Turning Torso Building.
- Enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.

**Day 7:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Visit the Bergen, with our recommended shore excursions or chose to walk and explore the city on your own.
- Enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.

**Day 8:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 9:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Visit the Kiel, with our recommended shore excursions or chose to walk and explore the city on your own.
- Enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.

**Day 10:** Copenhagen, Meals: Cruise Breakfast and Dinner
- Arrive in Copenhagen and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy the city tour and explore the city.

**Day 11:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast
- Visit the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue and many other interesting sights.
- Departure from Copenhagen Fly back home with pleasant memories!

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.
- All local taxes and services as of 1st September 2023.
- Cost of Visa and Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.
- Sightseeing and accommodation as per the above-mentioned itinerary.
- All transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
- Services of a professional, friendly and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative.
- Daily Continental buffet breakfast.
- 04 Indian Jain / vegetarian / non-vegetarian lunches.
- Meals on board as per the cruise itinerary.
- Hotel accommodation as per the itinerary.

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- All applicable luxury/road taxes.
- Port charges and passport charges.

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable for all optional activities pre-paid in India.
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses.
- Any expenses arising out of personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, wines, mineral water, food and drink not in the regular menu provided by us, minibar, telephone calls, etc.
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in your itinerary.
- Private airport transfers, Cost of Suggested / Optional Excursions.
